title: Tether has selected KPMG to conduct a full audit of its approximately $185 billion USDT reserves and hired PwC to prepare its internal systems. The move come...
message_html: Tether has selected KPMG to conduct a full audit of its approximately $185 billion USDT reserves and hired PwC to prepare its internal systems. The move come... ...
snippet: Wu Blockchain (@WuBlockchain): Tether has selected KPMG to conduct a full audit of its approximately $185 billion USDT reserves and hired PwC to prepare its internal systems. The move comes as Tether plans a U.S. expansion and seeks to raise $15–20 billion amid investor concerns over pricing and reg
